hooks.command: C:\PROGRA~1\Git\usr\bin\bash.exe -c "untracked=$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- '*.mp3' '*.wav' '*.png' '*.jpg' '*.svg' '*.gif' '*.ico' '*.woff' '*.woff2' '*.ttf' 2>/dev/null | head -20); if [ -n \"$untracked\" ]; then echo \"WARNING: Untracked asset files detected:\"; echo \"$untracked\"; echo \"Consider staging these before committing.\"; fi"
